passages.title: Daily Practice 1
passages.text: Typing every day improves speed, accuracy, and confidence. Small improvements made through regular practice lead to excellent long-term results.

passages.title: Daily Practice 2
passages.text: A good typing habit saves valuable time at work, school, and home. Focus on accuracy first, and speed will improve naturally with practice.

passages.title: Daily Practice 3
passages.text: Professional typists keep their eyes on the screen instead of the keyboard. This habit increases productivity and reduces typing mistakes.

passages.title: Daily Practice 4
passages.text: Learning touch typing requires patience and consistency. Practice a little every day instead of practicing for many hours only once a week.

passages.title: Daily Practice 5
passages.text: Correct finger placement helps reduce fatigue and improves typing efficiency. Relax your hands and maintain a comfortable sitting posture.

passages.title: Daily Practice 6
passages.text: Technology continues to change the way people communicate. Fast and accurate typing has become an important skill for students and professionals.

passages.title: Daily Practice 7
passages.text: Reading the complete sentence before typing helps maintain rhythm. Avoid rushing because accuracy is more important than raw speed.

passages.title: Daily Practice 8
passages.text: Practice with meaningful paragraphs instead of random words. Real sentences improve typing flow and help build better reading habits.

passages.title: Daily Practice 9
passages.text: Every mistake is an opportunity to improve. Stay calm, continue typing, and focus on developing consistent keyboard control.

passages.title: Daily Practice 10
passages.text: Smart Typing helps users measure typing speed, accuracy, and progress. Regular practice makes professional typing easier and more enjoyable.
